name: kopo
title: Kopo
description: Transform the selected text and paste it back
author: ioseb

commands.name: kopo
commands.title: Kopo
commands.description: Read selected text, transform it, paste it back

commands.name: kopo-modal
commands.title: Kopo (Modal)
commands.description: Read selected text, transform it, show in a modal

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
